doctrine.source: Local Instacart item export; raw CSV remains uncommitted.
doctrine.purpose: Alias unlocks from Instacart USDA Anchors 2 plus conservative onion-family grocery forms.
hold_notes: Cucumber, mint, lemongrass, butter, rice, salt, cheeses, and branded prepared items remain held.
Serrano aliases are only added after the USDA raw serrano anchor was inserted.

aliases.reason: Grocery wording for raw serrano pepper; target preserves raw serrano identity.
Brand label does not change raw serrano pepper identity.
Sweet onion grocery wording routes to the existing plain raw onion anchor for practical logging.
Yellow onion size wording routes to the existing plain raw onion anchor for practical logging.
Size wording does not change white onion identity.
